description: These 2 packs of colourful girls’ striped knitted tights will brighten your little one’s day, keep her legs warm, and introduce a bit of sparkle with a glittery stripe. Supersoft opaque knitted tights made from high quality materials – cotton for all-day freshness, polyester for durability and elastane for comfort and stretch – comfortable yet durable for everyday wear. 2 pair pack for extra value – one pair grey with yellow, blue, pink, green and sparkly white stripes, one pair red with pink, purple, blue, and sparkly white stripes – you receive 1 pair of each design shown. Available in sizes 2-3 Years, 4-5 Years, 5-6 Years, 7-8 Years. Made from 78% Cotton, 20% Polyester, 2% Elastane – machine washable.
